caption: A realistic video of a Texas Hold'em poker event at a casino. The same male player—late 30s, medium build, short dark hair, light stubble, sharp jawline—dressed in a fitted navy blazer over a charcoal tee, dark jeans, and a stainless-steel watch—flicks his cards onto the felt, then leans back in the chair with arms spread wide in celebration. The dealer continues dealing to the table as stacks of multicolored chips crowd the surface; slot machines and nearby patrons fill the background. The camera locks onto the player’s exuberant reaction. Wide shot to medium close-up.
